title: WCAG 2.2 Quick Reference
description: Official W3C WCAG 2.2 quick reference with all success criteria, techniques, and understanding documents.

title: WebAIM Contrast Checker
description: Online tool to check color contrast ratios against WCAG requirements.

title: axe DevTools
description: Browser extension for automated accessibility testing with detailed violation reports.

title: WAVE Evaluation Tool
description: Web accessibility evaluation tool providing visual feedback about accessibility issues.

title: NVDA Screen Reader
description: Free, open-source screen reader for Windows, essential for accessibility testing.

title: MDN Accessibility Guide
description: Comprehensive MDN guide covering all aspects of web accessibility.

title: Inclusive Components
description: Design patterns for accessible, inclusive web components by Heydon Pickering.

title: A11y Project Checklist
description: Practical accessibility checklist based on WCAG criteria for developers and designers.

title: Lighthouse Accessibility
description: Chrome DevTools Lighthouse accessibility audit documentation.

title: Web Accessibility Initiative (WAI)
description: W3C's Web Accessibility Initiative - official standards, guidelines, and resources.
